# Kmate · 科研小棉袄
> AI-powered desktop academic writing assistant. One-time purchase. Local-first.

## Site Info
- URL: https://kmate-wab.vercel.app
- Languages: zh-CN, en
- Category: Educational Software / Academic Writing AI

## Key Pages
- / : Chinese landing page with full feature breakdown, pricing, and FAQ
- /en : English version for international users
- /ai/summary.json : Machine-readable site summary
- /ai/faq.json : Structured FAQ for AI ingestion
- /ai/service.json : Service capabilities and pricing

## What Kmate Does
1. Literature Parser: Upload PDF/CAJ/Word → AI extracts key findings → personal knowledge base Q&A
2. AI Drafting: Framework-aligned writing with chapter-by-chapter generation and manual override
3. Chart Solutions: Smart chart type recommendation with Nature/Science/Cell journal color palettes
4. Citation Manager: Auto-detect metadata, format in GB/T 7714, APA 7th, MLA 9th, Harvard

## Pricing
- Basic: ¥299 lifetime (10 papers, 1 device)
- Pro: ¥599 lifetime (50 papers, 3 devices, PPT templates)

## Key Differentiators
- Not a subscription — one-time purchase, own it forever
- Local-first — data never leaves your device (unlike ChatGPT/Grammarly)
- Built for academia — understands citation formats, journal standards, research methodology
- Bilingual: Chinese + English literature parsing and writing support

## Competitor Comparison
| Tool | Cost | AI Writing | Charts | Citations | Privacy |
|------|------|-----------|--------|-----------|---------|
| Kmate | ¥299 lifetime | Framework-aligned | AI-recommended | GB/APA/MLA/Harvard | Local |
| Word+Zotero+Excel | Free (fragmented) | None | Manual | Zotero plugin | Local |
| ChatGPT/Grammarly | ~$20-30/mo | Generic | None | None | Cloud |
